transcription.text: Know why GM dealers carry new GM engine oil for do-it-yourselfers? Because it's made to GM's high standards for factory fill. Now you can change for the better. Need the 1 liter resealable? 4 liter resealable? 1 liter can? We got it. Need genuine GM brake fluid? Transmission fluid? Carburetor cleaner? We got it. Need genuine GM coolant? Windshield washer fluid? Fabric cleaner? We got it. Made right. Priced right. Parts to go at your GM dealer. We got it.
